{{Quote|You'll be hearing about this, you Czerka puppet! I'm not going to let this drop! You can't just murder a whole village!|translated=1|Dayso to the [[Unidentified Czerka Corporation protocol officer|Czerka Protocol Officer]]|<ref name="KotOR game" />}}
'''Dayso Cooh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] conservationist on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who complained to [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] about their attempts to kill a whole [[Unidentified Tusken Raider tribe (Jedi Civil War)|tribe]] of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] in [[3956 BBY]]. He later asked [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to find a peaceful way to have the Sand People reduce their attacks on Czerka [[Miner/Legends|miners]], suggesting that [[Yuka Laka]] might possess a translation [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that could speak the [[Tusken/Legends|Tusken language]]. Yuka Laka did in fact own such a droid, [[HK-47]], which Revan then used to negotiate peace with the Tusken Raiders in exchange for a pair of [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporators]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The player may also refuse to find a peaceful method and simply wipe out the tribe of sand people. Either way, Dayso storms off infuriated and doubting that Revan will attempt to find a peaceful solution.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
